calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Feb-16-2010 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Jan-21-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Elizabeth MacDonald, Esq. appeared for plaintiff University of Pennsylvania.
No appearance by defendant Isaac C. Flanagan.
Default was entered against defendant on March 2, 2009.
Doe defendants were dismissed on September 9, 2009.
Order waiving witness appearance at default prove-up hearing was filed January 8, 2010.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff University of Pennsylvania, and against the Defaulted Defendant Isaac C. Flanagan as follows:

Damages/Principal - $48,458.50.
Prejudgment Interest - $13,434.83.
Attorney's Fees - $2,206.88.
Costs - $473.00, for a total judgment in the amount of $64,573.21.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
